mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, PHONE, EMAIL, ROLE, STATUS, JOIN_DATE ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'ROLE_USER', '정상', SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, PHONE, EMAIL, ROLE, STATUS, LAWYER_STATUS, LICENSE_FILE, JOIN_DATE ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lawyerStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{licenseFile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID AS userId, NAME AS name, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, ROLE AS role, STATUS AS status, LAWYER_STATUS AS lawyerStatus FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND PASSWORD = #{password}

SELECT USER_ID AS userId, NAME AS name, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, ROLE AS role, STATUS AS status, LAWYER_STATUS AS lawyerStatus, LICENSE_FILE AS licenseFile FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT USER_ID AS userId, NAME AS name, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, ROLE AS role, STATUS AS status, LAWYER_STATUS AS lawyerStatus, LICENSE_FILE AS licenseFile FROM USERS WHERE LAWYER_STATUS = 'PENDING' ORDER BY JOIN_DATE DESC
